summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
MBE Auction is a specialist service from Mail Boxes Etc. Manchester - Piccadilly that provides bespoke collection, expert packing, and worldwide delivery of antiques, fine art, and collectables, leveraging relationships with over 300 auction houses and 2000 dealers across the UK and Ireland. It also offers general post, parcel, print, mailbox rental, and virtual office services.
